---
title: "Dr. James Yonge M.R.C.P., M.D."
---

## Dr. James Yonge M.R.C.P., M.D.

**Dates:** (11 March 1793-3 Jan 1870)

### Description

uncle of CMY, physician

### Biography

He married, first (12 Jan 1820), his cousin Margaret Crawley (d. 22 Apr 1867), daughter of Sir Thomas Crawley-Boevey, 3rd Bt.  He married secondly (25 Aug 1868), Anna Susanna Couch (1801-1894).  The children of his first marriage, James \'a few months older than myself, Eleonora, and Edward, the last born in 1827\' all died in 1830. [DNB, LG, Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 67, Death index, census returns]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from Jan 8th [or perhaps 6th, 1870]
- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]
- Letter from Oct 17th [1869]
- Letter from Sept 6th [1869]
- Letter from [Late August 1868]
- Letter from March 28th 1864
- Letter from February 25, 1854.
- Letter from February 24, 1854.
- Letter from Febry 23d [1854]
- Letter from [February 1854]
- Letter from 20 October [1850]
- Letter from March 14. 1849
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
